title: LiPo charger sensor node benchmark fixture
representative_intent: Single-cell LiPo charger, protection, fuel gauge, MCU and sensor

requirements.text: Represent single-cell LiPo charging path with charger IC, charge-current limit, and battery connector review evidence.
Provide battery protection and fuel-gauge evidence, including explicit non-claims for safety certification.
Connect low-power MCU and sensor loads with sleep-current/current-budget review evidence.
Attach proof-pack, KiCad, manufacturing export, rail current, regulator margin, thermal, and benchmark coverage evidence.

non_claims: This benchmark fixture is repository coverage evidence, not Li-ion battery safety certification or fabrication approval.
The fixture does not claim charge safety, pack protection adequacy, regulatory compliance, manufacturability, or production readiness.
